articles.value: Sandman, Shifting Scoundrel Commander Deck Tech
articles.excerpt: Bennie Smith, the king of mono-green, is back with another deck tech. This time we're looking at Sandman, Shifting Scoundrel, from Spider-Man.

articles.value: How to Play Green Differently in EDH
articles.excerpt: Green likes to do green things: play lands, summon big stompies, smash face. But what if you could take the color in another direction?
See why this cuddly Beastie from Duskmourn is 2024's top mono-green commander!
Get started with your Foundations commander deck with Dragons, landfall, or Cats!
